name: Deltarune- Awkward!
description:
End of Chapter 4, when you come across Toriel and Sans jittering away in Kris’ living room.

LOG 7: Well, I got a Nintendo Switch 2 recently. My games run a lot smoother, but I also lost all my Pokèmon saves for Violet, Shield, and Legends Arceus. I cried. Anywho, here’s one last bot before I start going through all nine layers of Hell. (Tech week, state testing, and Ag Mechanics State Finals)

QOTB (Quote of the Bot): “You’re not ‘bugging’ me, so ‘jitter’ away.”

-Sans, “Deltarune”.
creator: cybrkdwhn
